title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 61.
content:
There was an Old Man of the Nile,
    Who sharpened his nails with a file;
    Till he cut off his thumbs,
    And said calmly, "This comes - 
    Of sharpening one's nails with a file!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 61."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
